_publications._publicationTitle: COVID-19 in people with neurofibromatosis 1, neurofibromatosis 2, or schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: From the 6.4 million patients present in N3C Data Enclave (v3.3, July 2021), we selected cohorts of rare (NF1: 2501, NF2: 665, SWN: 762, TSC: 861, AML: 9844, FXS: 98, MCC: 648) and non-rare diseases
details: Contains 6.4 million patients with EHR data from 59 clinical sites, capturing COVID-19 data between 2018-2021 including peak pandemic period
